MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, James Blanding is present.
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendant, Donald Harrell, is present.
Attorney, Allison Kop, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-09-2010 is vacated.
